data.title: Review and rename conductor-track system
data.description:
Current setup uses .skogai/conductor/tracks//plan.md structure. Need to review this naming convention and rename to something more mainstream and commonly understood.

**Current terminology:**

* conductor
* tracks

**Questions:**

* What naming would be more intuitive?
* Should this align with common project management terms?
* How does this fit with the overall .skogai architecture?

Related task: .skogai/tasks/review-and-rename-conductor-track-system.md
